creator: trashcan@ellael.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Grimm from comment #14)

In addition to the ports already reported the following ports need to be added to PACKAGE_FETCH_BLACKLIST as well. After that poudriere bulk ... runs to completion:


Package fetch: Using cached copy of cmake-core-3.29.6
Deleting cmake-core-3.29.6.pkg: missing dependency: pkg-1.21.3
Error: /usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh:download_from_repo_post_delete:20:download_from_repo_post_delete: We lost fetched unversioned cmake-core-3.29.6.pkg
